message:
feat(download): add file download support with save dialog

- Add Browser.setDownloadBehavior to enable downloads in CDP
- Handle Browser.downloadWillBegin and Browser.downloadProgress events
- Add native save file picker (osascript on macOS, zenity/kdialog on Linux)
- Prompt user for save location when download starts
- Copy downloaded file to user-selected path when complete
- Clean up temp file after successful save
